datasetNotice: Seed dataset with sourced 2025 Grand Slam men's singles competition-prize rows, Australian Open 2025/2024, Wimbledon 2025/2024, and US Open 2025 tournament-total competition-prize rows, compatible Wimbledon operating-company financial denominators, plus explicitly labeled US Open and Roland Garros total-player-compensation context rows. Non-Wimbledon revenue and profit/surplus remain unavailable unless a clear tournament-level financial source is added.
